examples.inputSnippet: [flag:UNILATERAL_TERMINATION] 30-day termination for convenience is market standard for SaaS; over-flagged as high risk
examples.expectedBehavior: Do not raise this as a high/medium risk unless the contract text clearly supports a material, non-market-standard harm. Prefer sign_with_changes for industry-standard unfavorable terms.
examples.reasoning: Users marked this pattern as a false positive / over-warning. Calibrate severity downward when facts match.
